name: Wuxi Longsheng Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuxi Longsheng Technology Co., Ltd. researches and develops, produces, and sells engine exhaust gas recirculation (EGR) systems in China. It offers low pressure, diesel, and gasoline EGR valves; throttles; EGR coolers and modules; sensors; and controllers. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Wuxi, China.
